channel.title: Get Booked, Not F***ed
channel.description: The no-BS marketing show for home-service contractors. Two old tradesmen and an idiot apprentice tell you how to get found, get picked, and get booked — without getting screwed by the marketing industry. Raunchy, real, and occasionally educational.
channel.itunes:summary: No-BS marketing for plumbers, HVAC, roofers, electricians and tree guys. Get found, get picked, get booked.
channel.itunes:author: Booked Job

item.title: Ep. 3 — Answer Your Phone (Speed to Lead)
item.description: The first guy to call back wins — not the best guy, the first guy. Marshall explains why a missed call is a missed invoice, Dom defends never answering his phone, Cody gives a scammer the VIN off the truck, plus round three of Porno or Plumbing and a roofing outfit gets roasted.

item.title: Ep. 2 — Why Won't Anyone Leave a Review?
item.description: Reviews quietly decide whether your phone rings. Why the guy with 140 reviews beats you even when he's worse, Dom rages about a one-star, round two of Porno or Plumbing, and a local HVAC outfit gets roasted into the ground.

item.title: Ep. 1 — Is Angi Worth It?
item.description: Marshall and Dom break down whether buying leads from Angi is worth a damn (spoiler: do the math), play a round of Porno or Plumbing, and air a competitor's dirty laundry. Get found, get picked, get booked.
